info.title: Czech Audiobookshelf Metadata Provider
info.description: Custom metadata provider API for Audiobookshelf. It exposes a global search endpoint across enabled sources and source-specific search endpoints for individual storefronts.

get.description: Health endpoint for the `global` provider scope.

Search for metadata matches using Audiobookshelf-compatible query parameters. The global provider searches all globally enabled sources, while source-specific providers search only their own upstream.

502.description: All upstream requests for this provider failed.

title.title: Title
title.description: Primary title of the matched book or audiobook.

subtitle.title: Subtitle
subtitle.description: Subtitle when explicitly exposed by the source.

author.title: Author
author.description: Author list rendered as a comma-separated string.

narrator.title: Narrator
narrator.description: Narrator list rendered as a comma-separated string.

publishedYear.title: Publishedyear
publishedYear.description: Publication or release year as a string.

cover.title: Cover
cover.description: Absolute URL to the cover image.

isbn.title: Isbn
isbn.description: ISBN when explicitly available from the source.

asin.title: Asin
asin.description: ASIN when explicitly available from the source.

genres.title: Genres
genres.description: Genre names extracted from the source.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Additional tags extracted from the source.

matchConfidence.title: Matchconfidence
matchConfidence.description: Match confidence score between 0 and 1, used by Audiobookshelf for certainty badges.

matches.title: Matches
matches.description: Ordered list of normalized matches returned to Audiobookshelf.

AuthorizationHeader.description: Optional shared token. Accepts either the raw token or `Bearer <token>`.
AuthorizationHeader.name: AUTHORIZATION

tags.name: global
tags.description: Combined search across globally enabled sources.

tags.name: databazeknih
tags.description: Databaze knih book-metadata fallback endpoints for custom audiobooks.

tags.name: rozhlas
tags.description: Rozhlas audio and radio-drama provider endpoints.
